channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: If Platner drops out, what happens next? Here's who could replace him on the ballot and how it would work
item.description: Troy Jackson filed paperwork to explore a Senate run as several Democrats consider replacing Graham Platner on the ballot against Susan Collins.

item.title: Heating Up: CENTCOM Strikes Over 80 Iranian Targets After Shipping Attacks, Iran Vows 'Crushing Response'
Democratic Senate hopeful collected large taxpayer-funded payments while skipping hundreds of votes
item.description: Josh Turek, Paralympic gold medalist and Iowa Senate candidate, reportedly received over $20,000 in per diem while missing 58.7% of his 2026 votes.

item.title: House GOP Investigates Weingarten Book Expenses
item.description: House Republicans are looking into reports that American Federation of Teachers union dues were used to help produce, promote, and publish union President Randi Weingarten's book.
